member.name: F:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.MouseButton.Extended
member.summary: For buttons beyond the predefined ones, use ButtonNumber property

member.name: T:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.MouseButtons
member.summary: Flags enumeration for tracking multiple pressed mouse buttons simultaneously

member.name: T:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.MouseButtonState
member.summary: Represents the state of a mouse button

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.GetFrom(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.View)
member.summary: Gets the TouchEffect instance from a view's Effects collection
member.param: The view to get the effect from
member.returns: The TouchEffect instance, or null if not found

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.PointerData.Button
member.summary: The specific button that triggered this event (for Press/Release events)

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.PointerData.ButtonNumber
member.summary: Button number (1-based) - useful for gaming mice with many buttons 1=Left, 2=Right, 3=Middle, 4+=Extended buttons

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.PointerData.IsScrolling
member.summary: This is a scrolling gesture, logic is "Scrolled" will not have start or end of scrolling.

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.PointerData.State
member.summary: State of the button that triggered this event

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.PointerData.DeviceType
member.summary: Type of pointer device (Mouse, Pen, Touch)

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.PointerData.Pressure
member.summary: For pen: pressure (0.0 to 1.0), for mouse: always 1.0

member.name: F:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.TappedCancelMoveThresholdPoints
member.summary: How much finger can move for the gestured to be still considered as TAPPED. In points, not pixels, default is 5.

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.IsInsideView(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Relative to the view coordinates, not the entire screen

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.Draggable
member.summary: Set this to true not to cancel Moving action when moved outside while pressing

member.name: E:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.TapUnlocked
member.summary: Useful for removing tapped visual effects from button etc

member.name: F:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.Disposing
member.summary: Used by the platform code to dispose itself if Xamarin bugs and fails to detach it properly

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.OnLongPressTimerTick(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Handler for the timer tick event

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.EnsureLongPressTimer
member.summary: Initializes the long press timer if not already created

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.EnableLongPressingTimer
member.summary: Starts the long press detection timer

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchEffect.SendTappedCommand(AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs)
member.summary: We CANNOT invoke commands from background thread with Task.Run, otherwise it bugs (checked on android) when quickly spammed taps The UI thread just gets locked processing commands and bindings stop working

member.name: T:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.PointerDeviceType
member.summary: Represents the type of pointer device

member.name: T:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs
member.summary: Everything is in pixels!!! Convert to points if needed

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.CalculateVelocity(AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs)
member.summary: Using Distance.Delta and Time of previous args

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.PreventDefault
member.summary: This is used in some cases, ex: can set this to true inside LongPressing handler to avoid calling Tapped

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.Location
member.summary: In pixels inside parent view, 0,0 is top-left corner of the view

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.StartingLocation
member.summary: In pixels inside parent view, 0,0 is top-left corner of the view

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.IsInsideView
member.summary: Current hit is inside the view

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.Handled
member.summary: To do, would be used in synchronous mode, not used yet

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.NumberOfTouches
member.summary: How many fingers we have down actually

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.Pointer
member.summary: Mouse/Pointer specific data. Only set for mouse/pen events, null for touch events. Check if not null to determine if this is a mouse/pen event.

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.Distance
member.summary: In pixels inside parent view, 0,0 is top-left corner of the view

member.name: T:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.DistanceInfo
member.summary: In pixels inside parent view, 0,0 is top-left corner of the view

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.DistanceInfo.Delta
member.summary: In pixels inside parent view, 0,0 is top-left corner of the view

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.DistanceInfo.Total
member.summary: In pixels inside parent view, 0,0 is top-left corner of the view

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.DistanceInfo.Start
member.summary: In pixels inside parent view, 0,0 is top-left corner of the view

member.name: P:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchActionEventArgs.DistanceInfo.End
member.summary: In pixels inside parent view, 0,0 is top-left corner of the view

member.name: F:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchHandlingStyle.Lock
member.summary: Locks totally input for self, useful inside scroll view, panning controls like slider etc

member.name: F:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.TouchHandlingStyle.Manual
member.summary: You control how it works with with parent controls, if you set the effect `WillLock` property to Locked/Unlocked at runtime. This allows to work simultaneously inside a ScrollView, you could set WillLock to locked when you consume panning, and unlock it for the panning is wrong direction..

member.name: T:AppoMobi.Maui.Gestures.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
